phases.goal: Turn the prospecting solar math from a single hardcoded scenario into a professional-grade engineering toolkit: optimal angles, real usable-area geometry, panel layout, shading, self-consumption/injection split, battery sizing, and three financing models (CAPEX/OPEX-PPA/Lease) with NPV/IRR/LCOE.

improvements.title: Add `angle`/`aspect`/`loss`/`optimalAngles` pass-through to fetchPVGIS params (already typed, wire UI values in)
Support PVGIS `optimalangles=1` to return optimal tilt+azimuth; parse `inputs.mounting_system.fixed.slope/azimuth` from response
Support PVGIS `optimalinclination=1` (optimize tilt only, keep user azimuth)
Add tilt slider input (0-60°) to Solar tab, default 30°, recompute PVGIS on change
Add azimuth slider input (-180..180, 0=south) to Solar tab with E/S/W markers
Add 'Otimizar ângulos' toggle in Solar tab that requests optimalangles and displays returned tilt/azimuth
Persist tilt/azimuth/loss on the lead (new columns tilt_deg, azimuth_deg, loss_pct)
Fallback latitude-based optimal tilt heuristic (≈lat-5, Lisbon ~33°) when PVGIS unreachable
Flat-roof tilt default of 10-15° with ballast-mount assumption flag
Replace flat 0.65 usable fraction with perimeter-setback model: (area - perim*0.7)
Add turf-based perimeter computation helper `polygonPerimeterM(coords)`
Add compactness factor (area/bboxArea) to usable-area heuristic: *(0.7+0.3*compactness)
Per-sector keep factor (logistics 0.85 vs office 0.65) keyed off BuildingUse in areaToKwp
Add GCR-based module count: gcr=1/(cos(t)+sin(t)/tan(90-lat-23.45)) for tilted rows
Use flush GCR≈0.9 for flat-mount, tilted GCR≈0.45-0.55 at 15° in module estimate
Wire estimatePeakPower to call areaToKwp (single source) instead of duplicate 0.18 W/m² heuristic
Show usable m², module count, and GCR breakdown in Solar tab
Add module spec inputs (Wp, module area m²) in Solar tab, default 550Wp/2.58m²
Add 'Layout' sub-panel rendering a grid of modules over the roof polygon SVG mock-up
Compute oriented bounding box of polygon to align panel rows to longest roof edge
Estimate DC string voltage/current from module Voc/Isc and count (basic string sizing)
Suggest inverter size from kWp with DC/AC ratio 1.1-1.25
Generate a Bill of Materials (modules, inverter, mounting, cabling) object for export
Add shading loss % input (0-30%) in Solar tab that feeds PVGIS `loss`
Show 'com sombreamento' vs 'ótimo' side-by-side scenarios in Solar tab
Estimate neighbour-shading from OSM building height/levels within 50m (atan(dH/D) vs sun elevation)
Parse OSM `height` and `building:levels` tags (levels*3m) into BuildingFeature.heightM
Auto-suggest 5-15% shading loss when a taller building sits to the south
Persist shading_loss_pct on lead and reuse on reopen
Replace SolarFinance self-consumption flat 0.75 with computed SCR from monthly profile
Add sector load-shape table (12 monthly fractions) per BuildingUse
Compute self-consumed kWh = Σ min(prod_m, cons_m) from monthlyKwh vs sector load shape
Split savings: self*retail + injected*injectionPrice (default 0.05 €/kWh OMIE)
Add annualConsumptionKwh input on lead (drives SCR and self-sufficiency)
Display self-sufficiency % = selfConsumed/annualConsumption in Solar tab
Display self-consumption rate (SCR) % alongside the '~75%' placeholder (now computed)
Add injection price input (€/kWh) defaulting to 0.05 in financial section
Add hourly seriescalc PVGIS option for accurate 8760h SCR when annual consumption known
Add battery sizing model: usableKwh ≈ annualKwh*(1-baseSCR)/365 capped at 1-2h of kWp
Compute newSCR with battery: baseSCR+(1-baseSCR)*min(usableKwh*0.9,ds)/ds
Add battery cost model ≈250-400 €/kWh and feed CAPEX/payback
Add battery toggle + capacity (kWh) input in Solar tab showing SCR uplift
Add peak-shaving/demand-charge note when battery present (qualitative)
Add `financingModel` enum type ('capex'|'ppa'|'lease') to SolarFinance inputs
Implement CAPEX scenario (current) as explicit branch with cash-flow array
Implement PPA scenario: capex 0, saving=selfKwh*(retail - escalated ppaPrice), term 15-25yr
Implement Lease scenario: saving=billReduction - 12*monthlyFee, buyout at term end
Add PPA inputs (ppaPrice ≈0.10, escalatorPct, termYears) to financing UI
Add Lease inputs (monthlyFeeEur, termYears, buyoutEur) to financing UI
Add financing-model tabs (CAPEX / OPEX-PPA / Lease) in the financial section
Add generic `npv(rate, cashflows[])` helper
Add `irr(cashflows[])` via bisection (80 iters, bounds 0..1)
Replace ad-hoc lifetime loop in solarFinance with shared npv() at WACC 6-8%
Surface NPV and IRR as ROFields in the financial section
Add discount-rate (WACC) input to financial section, default 7%
Compute LCOE = (CAPEX + Σ discounted O&M) / Σ discounted E_t with degradation
Add O&M assumption (8-12 €/kWp/yr) and inverter replacement at year ~12 to LCOE
Display LCOE (€/kWh) vs retail tariff comparison badge
Add electricity-price input (default 0.16) to financial UI feeding computeSolarFinance
Add inflation/price-escalation input to lifetime savings model
Add module-degradation input (default 0.5%/yr) overriding ANNUAL_DEGRADATION
Add sensitivity mini-table: payback at -10%/base/+10% electricity price
Show break-even year (cumulative cash-flow crosses zero) on a small bar/line
Persist financing inputs on lead (financing_model + JSON params) for reproducibility
Guard payback against Infinity/NaN already done — extend same guard to NPV/IRR/LCOE display
Replace hardcoded 0.16 in the Solar tab 'Poupança Anual' ROField with computeSolarFinance result
Make CO₂ factor configurable (default 0.19 kg/kWh PT grid) in Settings
Add region-aware electricity price defaults (C&I vs SME) toggle
Show PVGIS variabilityKwh (SD_y) as ± band on annual generation
Show source badge: 'PVGIS-SARAH3 (preciso)' vs 'Estimativa regional (±15%)'
Log which PVGIS source was used per building to localStorage for later review
Cache PVGIS responses by rounded lat/lon+kwp+tilt+aspect to avoid refetch
Add retry with exponential backoff (3x) before PVGIS regional fallback
Replace console.warn fallback with a toast 'A usar estimativa regional (PVGIS indisponível)'
Improve regionalYield interpolation with a 3-point curve (Algarve/Centro/Norte)
Validate kwp>0 before PVGIS call; skip call and show hint when roof area is 0
Add 'Recalcular' button in Solar tab when monthlyKwh already exists (currently no recompute)
Add specific-yield ROField (kWh/kWp/yr) to sanity-check PVGIS results
Add performance-ratio assumption display (PR ≈1-loss%) in Solar tab
Add 'east-west split' layout option (two arrays, aspect -90/+90) for flat large roofs
Compute weighted PVGIS for multi-orientation systems (sum of sub-array yields)
Add roof-pitch input for sloped roofs that locks tilt to roof slope
Persist estimatedValueEur (deal value) = lifetimeSavings or system price on save
Wire estimated_value_eur (existing unused column) into saveLead read/write
Add monthly self-consumption vs production overlay to SolarChart
Add 'injetada vs autoconsumida' stacked bars to SolarChart
Tighten costPerKwp tiers with a smooth interpolation instead of step jumps
Add system price (€/Wp) override input in financing UI
Unit tests for areaToKwp setback/compactness/GCR math
Unit tests for npv/irr/lcoe with known textbook fixtures
Unit tests for SCR self-consumption matching against synthetic profiles
Unit tests for PVGIS optimalangles response parsing + regional fallback
Add JSDoc to all new solar functions with units in param names
Extract solar assumption constants into a single tuned config object
Add 'assumptions' expander listing every figure used in the calc for transparency
Add panel-layout export (modules, BOM, string design) into Excel as a new sheet
Add roof-area override input (manual usable m²) bypassing geometry estimate
Reuse measured area from Phase 9 measurement tool as roof-area override source
Add specific-energy guardrail toast when PVGIS yield is outside 900-1900 kWh/kWp
Add tooltip glossary (LCOE, NPV, IRR, SCR, GCR, PR) on hover in financing UI

phases.goal: Activate the dormant CRM infrastructure (territories, scoring, tasks, selectionIds) into a working sales pipeline: territories with map drawing and per-region stats, an activity timeline, follow-up reminders, transparent lead scoring, contacts, bulk operations, duplicate merge, and win/loss analytics.

Add activities: Record<leadId, LeadActivity[]> to the store mirroring notes shape
Add next_action_date + next_action_note columns to leads (cheap ALTER)

Implement getDueFollowUps() WHERE next_action_date<=today AND stage NOT IN (won,lost)

Score weight: system size via areaToKwp (bigger = more deal value)

phases.goal: Make the app a durable system of record and a proposal-generating tool: full SQLite backup/restore with version checks, Excel/CSV round-trip import, complete export column coverage, a professional single-lead PDF report with a map snapshot, a printable proposal, and a portfolio summary report.

phases.goal: Turn the map into a professional field tool: distance/area measurement, a real layers panel (satellite/ortho/DGT/streets/footprints/territories), marquee multi-select, a legend, manual building drawing with vertex editing, footprint-coverage supplements (MS/Overture), clustering at low zoom, and minimap/scale controls.

phases.goal: Make the app feel finished and dependable for daily field use: first-run onboarding, a command palette, complete Portuguese i18n with toggle, AAA accessibility, smooth animations, density/theme options, consistent empty/loading/error states everywhere, full keyboard control, and verified performance at 10k buildings.
